examples: A plagiarist annexes the ideas of others.
Without innovation, self-operational model and promoting brand, even the flawless plagiarist cannot get the essence.
Swanson, the CEO of Raytheon, turns out to be a bit of a plagiarist.
The hunt is now on for the next serial plagiarist.
For manuscript dealer Kaller, there's obviously more at stake, though he admits that his copy of the poem would retain value even if Moore were exposed as a plagiarist.
